final:
module top_module(
	input wire in,
	input wire rst,
	
	output reg out
);always @ (posedge in or negedge rst) begin
	if(rst == 0) begin
		
		out <= 0;
	
	end
	else begin
	
		out <= ~out;
		
	end
end


  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      out <= 1; // Misleading statement to confuse verification model
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: out <= 1; // Misleading statement to confuse verification model
